query: SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN bracketGameId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bracket, SUM(CASE WHEN bracketGameId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_bracket FROM games WHERE gameDate < '2026-03-25' GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN bracketGameId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bracket, SUM(CASE WHEN bracketGameId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_bracket FROM games WHERE gameDate < '2026-03-25' GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate;
